name: codex-kor-to-eng
description: Translate Korean Codex prompts to English before the turn starts.

interface.shortDescription: Translate Korean prompts into visible English context.
interface.longDescription: Codex Kor To Eng adds a UserPromptSubmit hook that detects Korean prompts, translates them to English through a configurable translator, and injects the translation as visible hook output plus Codex-readable context. Run scripts/configure_model.ps1 after install to choose Spark, Mini, or GPT-5.5.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me configure Korean-to-English prompt translation and choose Spark, Mini, or GPT-5.5.
